repositories.name: Cast Metadata & TV Controls
repositories.description: Local-first unified TV/Cast controller with one Home Assistant device per physical TV, automatic discovery, duplicate-device merging, persistent identity, capability routing, dynamic metadata, managed apps and inputs, activities, Wake-on-LAN, diagnostics, Repairs, transition events and opt-in positive-detection YouTube ad skipping. Version 8.2.0 activates hardware-evidence reconciliation, safely links companion Android TV Remote entities and media players, restores remote/native-app routing, deduplicates repeated Cast receivers, and adds source-level artwork fallbacks.

repositories.name: Unified TV Card
repositories.description: Container-responsive TV controller card with grouped dynamic TV/Cast app selection, a separate input selector, managed favourites, activities, mute beside volume, playback, remote controls, artwork, diagnostics and auto-discovered YouTube ad-skip controls. Version 1.3.0 resolves artwork from all grouped sources, handles relative Home Assistant artwork URLs, consumes backend remote availability, and reports detailed service failures.
